This solid white shaving soap is fragranced with Windsor, a fresh and complex scent that opens with bright citrus and grapefruit notes before developing into warmer tones of black pepper and vetiver. Refined and distinctive, it brings a classic yet modern character to the shaving routine. The triple-milled formula helps improve the richness, density and longevity of the lather. When used with a shaving brush, it softens the beard and creates a protective layer to support smooth razor glide. Incredibly economical, each soap can last for several months with regular use. Presented in a hand-turned beech wood bowl, it adds a traditional feature to the bathroom while providing a practical home for the soap. Refill soaps are available, allowing the treated wooden bowl to be reused for many years as it develops its own character. For the matching bowl, see D.R. products.name: Féret Parfumeur 'Bloc Hyalin' Alum Bloc 100g
products.product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Shaving & Grooming
products.description: The Féret Parfumeur Bloc Hyalin is a 100% natural potassium alum stone, renowned for its astringent, antiseptic, and antiperspirant properties. Sourced from Grade A+ Kalunite, this high-purity crystal is ideal for use as a natural deodorant, post-shave treatment, or to prevent chafing and friction during sport. Unlike synthetic alternatives made with ammonium alum, the true Bloc Hyalin is slightly translucent and marbled, visibly distinguishing its authentic quality. Féret Parfumeur has been producing the original registered Bloc Hyalin since 1878, with a legacy protected by French law since 1899. Apply to damp skin to leave an invisible, protective layer of microcrystals that help prevent bacteria and neutralise odour without blocking pores. Perfect for use after shaving to soothe razor burn, or before physical activity to keep feet and underarms dry. Key Features: 100% Natural Potassium Alum – Sourced from Grade A+ Kalunite Fragrance-Free & Hypoallergenic – Gentle and suitable for all skin types Multifunctional Use – Acts as a natural deodorant, post-shave astringent, and anti-chafing aid Authentic Bloc Hyalin – Recognisable by its translucent, marbled appearance Long-Lasting & Economical – Up to 24 hours of odour protection Specifications: Size: 100g solid stone Material: 100% Potassium Alum Packaging: Eco-friendly recyclable box (tin case sold separately) Made In: France How To Use:Wet the stone under warm water and apply directly to clean skin. For deodorising, apply to underarms or feet. For post-shave care, gently rub over shaved skin to soothe irritation and reduce redness.

products.product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Perfume & Cologne
products.description: Floris No.89 After Shave is a traditional post-shave splash, created to tone and refresh the skin while delivering the timeless scent of No.89. Formulated with witch hazel to close pores and glycerine to help moisturise, it offers a clean, invigorating finish after every shave. No.89 opens with bergamot, orange, lavender, and neroli, warmed with nutmeg and supported by a floral heart of geranium, rose, and ylang ylang. The base blends sandalwood, cedarwood, vetiver, musk, and oakmoss, forming a balanced, masculine scent with enduring appeal. This fragrance was introduced in 1951 and named after the Floris flagship on Jermyn Street. Originally developed in the lower level of the store, known affectionately as "The Mine", No.89 remains one of the most iconic scents in British grooming. It has been worn by names such as Cary Grant and Ian Fleming. products.name: Henson AL13 Safety Razor V2.0  - Grey - Aggressive +++
products.product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Shaving & Grooming > Razors & Razor Blades
products.description: The Henson AL13 Aggressive in Grey is the most efficient razor in the AL13 range. With a 0.98 mm blade gap and increased blade exposure, this variant is designed for experienced wet shavers with coarse or dense beard growth who want maximum cutting efficiency in fewer passes. This Henson razor is manufactured in Canada from aircraft-grade aluminium, CNC-machined to tolerances of +/- 0.00025 inches. The head design supports the blade close to the cutting edge, reducing flex and chatter. The aggressive geometry means more blade is exposed to the skin, requiring good technique and a light touch. At just 37g, the Henson AL13 remains lightweight despite its aggressive configuration. The grey anodised finish provides corrosion resistance and a clean, understated appearance. Unlike the standard AL13 which offers Mild and Medium options, the Grey Aggressive is a single-configuration razor for those who know they need more blade exposure. This is not a beginner razor. It suits those already comfortable with double edge safety razors who find Mild or Medium variants too gentle for their beard type. Who Is The Aggressive For Coarse or dense beard growth: Those who find standard razors require too many passes to achieve a close shave. Experienced wet shavers: Users familiar with blade angle and pressure control who want greater efficiency. Less frequent shavers: Those who shave every few days and need to cut through longer stubble. If you are new to safety razors or have sensitive skin, consider the standard AL13 in Mild or Medium instead. For related Henson Shaving options, compare Henson AL13 Safety Razor V2.0 - Aircraft Aluminium with Henson AL13 Safety Razor V2.0 - Jet Black, or browse the Henson Shaving collection. For compatible blades, see Henson RK Shaving Stainless DE Razor Blades - 100 Pack or Henson RK Blades Pack of 5. products.name: Henson Ti22 Titanium Safety Razor
products.product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Shaving & Grooming > Razors & Razor Blades
products.description: The Henson Ti22 is a titanium safety razor built from Grade 5 Titanium, the same alloy used in aerospace and medical applications. This material is stronger than steel yet lighter, offering exceptional durability without adding unnecessary weight. The bare titanium finish requires no coating and will not wear or fade over time. At 63g, the Ti22 titanium razor is heavier than the aluminium AL13 (37g), providing additional feedback during shaving. This weight encourages controlled, deliberate strokes while the precision-machined head maintains consistent blade alignment. CNC-machined to tolerances of +/- 0.00025 inches, the geometry ensures the blade sits at the correct angle without adjustment. The Henson Ti22 is manufactured in Canada and represents the top of the Henson range. For those seeking a double edge safety razor built from premium materials with no compromise on engineering, this is the flagship option. Mild, Medium Or Aggressive: Which To Choose Mild (0.68 mm / 0.027" blade gap): Best for those new to safety razors, daily shavers with lighter growth, or anyone with sensitive skin. Offers a gentler introduction with minimal blade exposure. Medium (0.84 mm / 0.033" blade gap): The recommended choice for most users. Suited to regular to coarse beard growth and provides efficient, comfortable shaving. If unsure, start here. Aggressive (0.99 mm / 0.039" blade gap): Designed for experienced wet shavers with coarse or dense growth. Maximum blade exposure for efficient cutting in fewer passes. All three deliver a close shave. The difference lies in blade exposure and efficiency. Retaining the original proportions and shaving geometry that made the Merkur 23 a long-standing classic, this version introduces premium stainless steel construction for enhanced durability and long-term reliability. The long handle features a diamond-shaped cross knurl, providing excellent grip even with wet or soapy hands. Its balanced length encourages smooth, controlled strokes, making the razor particularly suitable for first-time safety razor users as well as experienced wet shavers. The straight cut, closed comb razor head delivers a gentle yet effective shave for both beard and body use. A generous blade gap allows lather and hair to rinse away easily, helping to keep the blade clean and hygienic throughout the shave. Constructed using 1.4301 stainless steel for the handle and 316L stainless steel for the razor head with a satin finish, the Merkur 23 INOX is designed to perform consistently even in demanding or humid environments.
